title: Convert integers to Roman numerals
prompt: Implement `int_to_roman(n)` in solution_stub.py for integers 1..3999. The current version only does additive numerals, so it returns 'IIII' for 4. Handle the subtractive forms correctly: 4 -> 'IV', 9 -> 'IX', 40 -> 'XL', 90 -> 'XC', 400 -> 'CD', 900 -> 'CM'.
